description: Approved checksum of the concatenated public/styles.css @import tree. verify-css-split.mjs compares the live concatenation against this fixture so intentional CSS edits must refresh the snapshot explicitly. Shallow CI checkouts do not need historical Git objects.
updateInstructions: When intentionally changing CSS content, concatenate public/styles.css imports, recompute utf8ByteLength and sha256, then update this fixture in the same commit.
